info.name: Book of the Fallen - Custom Feats
info.description: Contains Custom Feats created specifically for the campaign "Book of the Fallen".

description.p: Shadows now bow to your will, for the Shadowthrone mark is upon your soul. You gain the following benefits:

ul.li: You can enter or exit Meanas as an action.
You gain a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks, and you can`t be detected or targeted by divination magic, including scrying sensors.
You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

sheet.description: You can enter or exit Meanas as an action. You gain a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and you can`t be detected or targeted by divination magic, including scrying sensors. You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

description.p: An art lost to the Tiste Andii, has been kept alive by the assassin priesteses of Meanas. You gain the following benefits:

ul.li: You can perfom the non martial version of Shadow Dance.
You can permorm the Shadow Dance once every short rest.
If a targeted spell attack misses you, you can use your reaction to initiate the Shadow Dance.

sheet.description: You are a Shadow Dancer. You can perfom both the non martial and martial version of Shadow Dance.

description.p: You have become Mistborn by the swallowing of a bead of Lerasium:

ul.li: You can burn various metals which alter your physical and mental abilities. This ability is known as Allomancy and its secrets are closely guarded.
You can burn steel 1d4 times (every short rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The steel must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.
You can burn iron 1d4 times (every short rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The iron must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.
You can burn pewter 1d4 times (every long rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The pewter must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.
You can burn various metals which alter your physical and mental abilities. This ability is known as Allomancy and its secrets are closely guarded.
You can burn steel 1d4 times (every short rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The steel must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.
You can burn iron 1d4 times (every short rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The iron must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.
You can burn pewter 1d4 times (every long rest if you have access to salvageable steel. The pewter must be non magical), without expending a spell slot.

description.p: You develop your conversational skill to better deceive others. You gain the following benefits:

ul.li: Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20
You gain proficiency in the Persuasion skill. If you are already proficient in the skill, you add double your proficiency bonus to checks you make with it.

When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one attack with an attempt to persuade one humanoid you can see within 30 feet of you that can see and hear you. Make a Charisma (Persuasion) check contested by the target’s Wisdom (Insight) check. If your check succeeds, your movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks from the target and your attack rolls against it have advantage; both benefits last until the end of your next turn or until you use this ability on a different target. If your check fails, the target can’t be deceived by you in this way for 1 hour.

sheet.description: You can attempt to persuade one humanoid you can see within 30 feet of you that can see and hear you. Make a Charisma (Persuasion) check contested by the target’s Wisdom (Insight) check. If your check succeeds, your movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks from the target and your attack rolls against it have advantage; both benefits last until the end of your next turn or until you use this ability on a different target. If your check fails, the target can’t be deceived by you in this way for 1 hour.

description.p:
When you use your Action to Dash or Jump using Allomancy, as a Bonus Action you can make one melee weapon Attack or Shove a creature with Advantage.
Additionally, if you:
Dash: move at least 10 feet in a straight line immediately before taking this Bonus Action
Jump: move 10 feet before performing the Jump and land within reach of the target
you either gain a +5 bonus to the attack damage roll (if you make a melee attack and hit), or push the target up to 10 feet away from you (if you shove and you succeed).

sheet.description:
When you use your Action to Dash or Jump using Allomancy, as a Bonus Action you can make one melee weapon Attack or Shove a creature with Advantage.
Additionally, if you Dash and move move at least 10 feet in a straight line immediately before taking the Bonus Action, or if move 10 feet before Jumping and land within reach of the target, you either gain a +5 bonus to the attack damage roll, or push the target up to 10 feet away from you.

p.em: Prerequisite: Proficiency in Persuasion and Medicine higher than 3

description.p: You have the ability to inspire and heal those who are suffering, both physically and emotionally.

ul.li: When you use an action to administer first aid to a creature, that creature also gains temporary hit points equal to your level + your Wisdom modifier.
When you use a bonus action to make a Persuasion check on a creature that is frightened, it is no longer frightened.
Once per long rest, you can use an action to grant all creatures within a 60-foot radius of you advantage on saving throws against fear for 1 hour.

description.p: Empowering Presence. You emanate a natural aura of confidence and resolve. As an action, you can grant a number of creatures within 30 feet of you equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1) advantage on all attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks until the start of your next turn. These creatures must be able to see or hear you. Once per long rest.

If you have at least 3 attacks available during your turn and are wielding a metallic weapon, you can expend one superiority die to sacrifice 3 attacks to make a single attack guided by your Allomancy. After making the attack roll, you can choose whether to add the superiority die to your Attack or Damage roll. If the attack hits, it automatically counts as a critical hit.

If the target is wearing metallic armour or wielding metallic weapons, an ally Lurcher or Coinshot within 60 feet of the target can expend their reaction to assist the strike by imbalancing them, granting you a +5 to your attack roll.
At 16th level, you can manipulate the target's metallic armour or weapons yourself through your Allomancy, granting yourself the +5 bonus to your attack roll without requiring an ally.

sheet.description: Sacrifice 3 attacks and expend 1 superiority die on your turn to make a single attack. If the attack hits, it is an automatic critical. After the attack roll, add the superiority die to Attack or Damage. A Lurcher/Coinshot within 60ft can expend their Reaction to give you +5 to hit. At level 16, you can apply this +5 yourself through your own Allomancy.
